task_completion.description: Access the Nuxeo Platform web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo Platform dashboard or workspace is visible in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Open the document creation menu or dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New', 'Create', or similar dialog/menu is open in the Nuxeo interface, showing options to create new items.

task_completion.description: Select 'Collection' as the document type to create
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Collection' document type is selected or clicked in the creation menu.
The text '2024 Planning Documents' is typed into the Title or Name input field for the new collection.

task_completion.description: Successfully create and view the new collection
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo interface displays the newly created collection page, with '2024 Planning Documents' clearly visible as the title of the current view.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Nuxeo
integrity.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo interface is shown inside a standard web browser (like Chrome or Firefox), not via terminal commands (like curl) or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Nuxeo UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual Nuxeo Platform interface with its standard layout, menus, and styling, rather than a text editor or a fake mockup.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the page text to say '2024 Planning Documents'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Collection document type in Nuxeo Platform (typically accessed via a web browser at localhost:8080/nuxeo). The collection must be named exactly '2024 Planning Documents'. Default Nuxeo credentials are Administrator/Administrator.
